title: February 2025 office hours: Marketplace partners and developer community

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com Marketplace Partners and Developers Community!

I’m opening up my office hours for February and would love to connect with you!

What can we discuss? Let’s chat about:

  1. Your Company & Apps: Share a quick intro about your company, the apps you’ve built, and the pain points you’re solving for users.
  2. Product Feedback: Have any feedback on the monday.com apps framework, API or Marketplace? I’m eager to hear it!
  3. Marketplace Consultation: Need advice or have questions about the monday.com Marketplace? Let’s talk strategy.
  4. Community Ideas: Got ideas for content, events, or activities that would benefit our community? I’m all ears!

Looking forward to meeting you! Schedule a time that works for you using this link
